message:
chore: append agent-verified audit entries to batch 491

Verified 3 background audit agent findings:
- dns/resolver.rs: Agent HIGH was FALSE POSITIVE (Instant::now + elapsed correctly shares timeout)
- kafka.rs: Agent HIGH was FALSE POSITIVE (ensure_initialized is lock-guarded + idempotent)
- kafka_consumer.rs: Agent MEDIUM was FALSE POSITIVE (kafka test path uses rdkafka, not local records)
- body.rs: Agent LOWs confirmed as documentation gaps only
